title: Top 25 Solutions Engineering Voices of 2026
subtitle: The most influential practitioners, authors, and community builders shaping Solutions Engineering and Pre-Sales
methodology: Ranked by cross-list appearances, published work, community impact, and relevance to Solutions Engineering. Sources include PreSales Collective community tracking, NAASE membership, SE Nation, industry publications, presales book authors, podcast host analysis, and demo platform founder tracking. We evaluated 50+ candidates and filtered for people who actively shape how SE teams operate.

voices.name: John Care
voices.title: Managing Director & Author
voices.bio: Author of 'Mastering Technical Sales,' now in its 4th edition and the book every SE has read or been handed on day one. Built SE orgs at Oracle, Sybase, Business Objects, Nortel, CA, and HP. 45,000+ students trained. Created the First Law of Discovery and Demo Crime Files. The foundation the profession is built on.

voices.name: Peter Cohan
voices.title: Founder & Author
voices.bio: Author of 'Great Demo!' and 'Doing Discovery,' two books that changed how SEs think about demos and technical discovery. His 'Do the Last Thing First' methodology is practiced at hundreds of companies. Decades of enterprise software experience across presales, sales, marketing, and C-suite roles.

voices.name: Chris White
voices.title: Founder & Managing Director
voices.bio: Author of 'The Six Habits of Highly Effective Sales Engineers.' Former software engineer who made a mid-career switch to SE. Offers the Six Habits Certification program. Known for teaching SEs how to deliver compelling executive demos that close deals.

voices.name: James Kaikis
voices.title: Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded PreSales Collective, the largest community for presales professionals with 15,000+ members. Hosts The PreSales Podcast. Partnered with Vivun to reshape the profession. Advocate for standardizing 'Solutions Consultant' as the primary title. Built the infrastructure that turned SE from scattered profession to connected community.

voices.name: Garin Hess
voices.title: Founder & Author
voices.bio: Created the Demo Automation category in 2013-2014. Author of 'Buying is Hard, Selling is Harder.' Serial entrepreneur with 20+ years experience. Built Consensus to $110M+ in funding. Clients report 29% shorter sales cycles. Changed how the industry thinks about async demos.

voices.name: Patrick Pissang
voices.title: CEO & Author
voices.bio: Former MuleSoft SE from early days to IPO. Co-authored 'The Social Sales Engineer' with Don Carmichael. Trains SEs on personal branding and thought leadership. Leader of #TeamPhoenix community. His focus on the social/content side of SE careers fills a gap most technical training ignores.

voices.name: Ramzi Marjaba
voices.title: Founder & Podcast Host
voices.bio: LinkedIn 'Top Voice in Sales Engineering.' Founded We the Sales Engineers podcast and community. Background spans Support Engineer, Network Design Engineer, Lead SE, and Solution Specialist since 2014. His interviews create a living archive of how the profession is evolving.

voices.name: Don Carmichael
voices.title: Founder & Coach
voices.bio: Co-authored 'The Social Sales Engineer' with Patrick Pissang. Co-hosts 'Two PreSales in a Pod.' Founded the PreSales Leaders Forum. Keynote speaker focused on Buyer Enablement and Value Discovery. Building the professional certification infrastructure that gives SEs formal career validation.

voices.name: Jack Cochran
voices.title: General Manager
voices.bio: 15+ years in analytics, consulting, and client relationships. Co-hosts PreSales Podcast and PreSales LIVE on LinkedIn. Former PreSales leadership at ActionIQ. PSC member since 2020, now running the organization. His operational leadership keeps the largest SE community running.

voices.name: Matt Darrow
voices.title: Co-Founder & CEO
voices.bio: Felt the pain of building presales orgs at Zuora and SignalFx. Co-founded Vivun, the presales intelligence platform backed by Salesforce Ventures. Partnered with PreSales Collective to reimagine the profession. His mission: give SE leaders the same data infrastructure sales and marketing have had for years.

voices.name: Aron Bohlig
voices.title: Co-Author & Investment Banker
voices.bio: Co-created Mastering Technical Sales with John Care in 2000. Former tech investment banker at Credit Suisse First Boston. Previously Director of Vertical Product Management at Nortel. His finance-meets-SE perspective is unique in the community.

voices.name: Yuji Higashi
voices.title: PreSales Leader & Career Coach
voices.bio: Active LinkedIn voice on SE career development. Built the PreSales team at Outreach. Writes extensively about SE compensation, career paths, and hiring. His practical content on SE salary negotiation and career progression helps individual contributors advocate for themselves.

voices.name: Chris Orlob
voices.title: CEO & Founder
voices.bio: Former Head of Research at Gong. Analyzed millions of recorded sales calls to find what separates great demos from average ones. Now runs pclub.io. His data-driven frameworks give SEs evidence-based methods instead of opinions.

voices.name: Damian Hanna
voices.title: Former President, NAASE
voices.bio: President of the North American Association of Sales Engineers (2022-2024). 23+ years in technical software sales. His leadership of NAASE helped bring institutional credibility to a profession that long operated without formal industry representation.

voices.name: Conor Meng
voices.title: Solutions Engineer & Podcast Host
voices.bio: SE at Twilio and co-hosts The Sales Engineering Podcast with Alex Navarrete. Their show uncovers stories, perspectives, and best practices around SE programs and leadership. Targets SEs, SE Managers, and AEs who work with SEs.

voices.name: Neil McLean
voices.title: CEO & Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded Navattic in 2020, one of the fastest-growing interactive product demo platforms. His vision of self-service demos that SEs can create without engineering help is changing how presales teams scale their impact beyond live meetings.

voices.name: Brian Lewis
voices.title: Co-Founder & CRO
voices.bio: Career presales professional who co-founded Homerun with his brother Kevin. Building presales software for high-performing teams. Corporate partner of NAASE. His practitioner-turned-founder perspective ensures the product solves real SE problems.

voices.name: Mark Petz
voices.title: Founder
voices.bio: Founded SE Nation, a community and content platform for sales engineers. His work on SE enablement and community building created one of the alternative hubs where SEs connect outside of PreSales Collective.

voices.name: Natalie Mendes
voices.title: VP Solutions Engineering
voices.bio: Runs SE at Gong, the conversation intelligence platform SEs use to analyze their own demos. Her unique position leading an SE team at a company that builds tools for SEs gives her content a meta-quality that practitioners find genuinely valuable.

voices.name: Julie Holmes
voices.title: VP Solutions Consulting
voices.bio: Leads solutions consulting at Salesforce, one of the largest SE organizations in the world. Her content on enterprise SE management, scaling global presales teams, and building inclusive SE cultures provides a blueprint for world-class presales operations at scale.

voices.name: Vivek Reddy
voices.title: VP of Presales
voices.bio: Runs presales at Clari and shares insights on SE team design, metrics, and revenue alignment. His perspective on how presales fits into the broader revenue engine helps SE leaders communicate their value in language that CFOs and CROs understand.

voices.name: Gal Aga
voices.title: CEO & Co-Founder
voices.bio: Co-founded Walnut, one of the leading demo experience platforms. His content on the future of interactive demos and how SEs can create personalized buying experiences at scale shapes how the industry thinks about demo technology.

voices.name: Arin Sime
voices.title: Demo Coach
voices.bio: Trains teams on Peter Cohan's Great Demo! methodology. His hands-on coaching work with SE teams at dozens of companies gives him pattern recognition on what demo practices actually win deals vs. what just looks good in training slides.

voices.name: Ed Jaffe
voices.title: CEO & Founder
voices.bio: Runs Demo Solutions, a consultancy focused on demo environment strategy and management. His deep expertise on building and maintaining demo environments, sandbox management, and demo data strategy addresses the operational pain most SEs deal with daily.

voices.name: Tina Kung
voices.title: Director of Solutions Engineering
voices.bio: Leads SE teams at Clari and shares candid content about being a woman in presales, building diverse SE teams, and navigating the SE career ladder. Her perspective on inclusion in a historically male-dominated role is both needed and refreshing.
